title: The Best of Chongqing + Chengdu China
details: Explore the vibrant mountain city of Chongqing and the cultural charm of Chengdu in this exciting 5D/4N journey. Experience iconic sights like the Yangtze River Cableway, Panda House, Liziba train-through-building, and historic streets, combined with shopping and cultural immersion.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA for flight CA480 MNL–TFU 02:55–06:55. Arrival in Chengdu, meet tour guide, transfer to Chongqing. Visit Ciqikou Ancient Town and Chongqing Ring Mall. Hotel check-in and overnight in Chongqing.

After breakfast, visit latex shop (compulsory shopping). Explore Jiefangbei Pedestrian Street, Eighteen Ladder Folk Customs Street, and Saint Joseph Catholic Church. Photo stop at Yangtze River Cableway. Overnight in Chongqing.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Chongqing + Chengdu China/Day2_1774231930.jpg

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, visit Medicine Shop (2 hours). Tour Chaotianmen Square, Kuixing Building, Eling No.2 Factory Cultural Park, and free shopping at Raffles City. Overnight in Chongqing.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Chongqing + Chengdu China/Day3_1774231934.jpg

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, visit Chongqing Zoo Panda House and Liziba Viewing Platform. Shopping stop at Jewelry Store (2 hours). Transfer to Chengdu. Hotel check-in and overnight in Chengdu.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Chongqing + Chengdu China/Day4_1774231953.jpg

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, free time shopping at silk stores and Kuanzhai Valley. Transfer to airport for flight CA479 TFU–MNL 21:30–01:00+1. Arrival in Manila.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Chongqing + Chengdu China/Day5_1774231950.jpeg

inclusions: Meals as indicated in the itinerary
exclusions: Other items not mentioned in the itinerary
extra_details: Mode of Payment: ₱15,000 initial down payment; full payment 45 days before travel period.
